messages.subject: Need your approval today
messages.body: Please review the budget update and reply today with your approval.

messages.subject: New sign-in detected
messages.body: We noticed a new sign-in to your account. If this was not you, secure your account now.

messages.subject: Your order is on the way
messages.body: Your recent order has shipped. View your tracking details and receipt online.

messages.body: This week's newsletter includes travel ideas, personal essays, and special promotions for members.

messages.subject: Travel itinerary, receipt, calendar hold, and personal note
messages.body: Your travel itinerary is confirmed. The receipt is attached, the calendar event is ready, and this personal reminder is included for your trip.
